response.overview: Following their high school graduation, Olafs and Ronis spend an aimless day in a small Latvian seaside town. Attempting to alienate their hangovers, Ronis steals 15 euros from his father to buy marijuana setting of chain of events that, after a confrontation with the police and driving under the influence ends in a tragic car crash, where one of the protagonists perishes making this accidents as a harsh boundary between childhood irresponsibility and adulthood.
response.title: Uz saulrietiem skatoties
